baselinePolicy.selection: latest accepted summary artifact with matching schemaVersion, scoreModel.version, and enabled tier set ordered by generatedAt desc
baselinePolicy.firstRunBehavior: skip baseline-dependent checks and report first-run

typedShapes.goldenFiles: array of exact repo-relative file path strings
typedShapes.goldenSymbols: array of exact symbol identifier strings
typedShapes.goldenImplementations: array of exact implementation identifier strings
typedShapes.acceptableAlternates: array of exact implementation identifier strings
typedShapes.invalidImplementations: array of exact implementation identifier strings
typedShapes.forbiddenFalsePositives: array of exact symbol names, exact file path suffixes, or exact lowercase token strings
typedShapes.goldenTests: array of exact repo-relative test file paths or exact test IDs
typedShapes.goldenRuntimeArtifacts: array of exact repo-relative config/runtime artifact paths or identifiers
typedShapes.requiredConsequenceTerms: array of exact lowercase consequence tokens
typedShapes.freshnessSetup: object with newTargets:string[] and staleTargets:string[] using exact symbol names or exact repo-relative paths

matchingSemantics.fileMatch: exact repo-relative path equality unless a field explicitly says path suffix
matchingSemantics.runtimeArtifactMatch: exact repo-relative path or exact declared identifier equality
matchingSemantics.consequenceTermMatch: case-insensitive token equality against tokenized evidence output
matchingSemantics.testMatch: exact repo-relative test path equality or exact test ID equality

evidenceOrdering.topKRule: first requiredTopK entries after stable sort

applicability.multi_impl: family in {multi-implementation-disambiguation, connector-discovery, provider-discovery, plugin-discovery} or acceptableAlternates non-empty or goldenImplementations non-empty
applicability.impact: family in {affected-tests, config-to-runtime, scheduler-flow, ui-to-backend-flow, cli-entry-flow} or impactRequired == true

scoring.renormalization: case_score = sum((weight_d / sum(weights_applicable)) * raw_score_d) over applicable dimensions

freshness.surfacingPass: top-K contains at least one newly added file or symbol from newTargets after mutation
freshness.suppressionPass: top-K contains no stale file/symbol/path from staleTargets after mutation

impact.affectedTests: |predicted_tests intersect goldenTests| / |goldenTests| * 100 when goldenTests non-empty else N/A
impact.configRuntime: matched_golden_runtime_artifacts / total_golden_runtime_artifacts * 100 when goldenRuntimeArtifacts non-empty else N/A
impact.consequence: matched_required_consequence_terms / total_required_consequence_terms * 100 when requiredConsequenceTerms non-empty else N/A
impact.renormalization: same renormalization formula over applicable impact subparts

aggregation.globalQualityScore: weighted sum of enabled tier scores with weights core 0.60, extended 0.30, stress 0.10 renormalized over enabled tiers

hardGates: every enabled repo pin/dirty check passes
scoreFloors: global quality score >= baseline quality - 1.00 when baseline exists
diagnostics: output-byte regression <= 20% unless global quality score >= baseline + 5.00 and no core repo score drops > 2.00

nonMutationProof.comparison: before/after recursive byte-content fingerprints and exact HEAD/dirty equality
exclusions: disposable temp fixtures outside source repo paths

stressMetadata.validation: actual repo HEAD == commitSha and actual dirty == false exactly
